Special offer: $10 off / month

Free includes:
Up to 3 boards
Boards are the place for organizing all your work and data (e.g. projects, clients, processes).
Up to 3 Docs
Create docs and collaborate with your team in real time. As your collaboration thrives, turn those words into actions with live updated data using monday.com Real Time Engine!
200+ templates
Choose from over 200+ templates for every industry, and customize them to fit your team's needs.
8 column types
Build your board the way you want with a variety of column types.
iOS and Android apps
Stay connected on-the-go and access monday.com from your smart phone.

1 published vibe app

Enterprise-scale automations & integrations

Portfolio management

Multi-level permissions
Robust permissions at every level to give you full control.
Tailored onboarding
In-depth training for your team to help you get the most out of monday.com. Provided that customers meet the minimum spend threshold as applicable from time to time.
Enterprise support
Get 24/7 expert support, tailored onboarding with extensive training, daily webinars, a rich library of tutorials, and a 99.9% uptime SLA for true enterprise-grade reliability.

Go to homepage
Integrations & apps
Connect the tools you already use to work smarter
Discover 850+ integrations and apps to centralize work,
enhance collaboration, and drive better business results faster.
Get Started
Connectivity
Bring all your tools together
Integrate your favorite apps in seconds to create workflows for any need - bringing every team’s work into one place and keeping it perfectly aligned.
Get Started
Efficiency
Automate every workflow
Enable 2-way sync between monday products and any platform you work with to trigger automations, eliminate manual work, and keep your business in motion.
Get Started
Impact
Drive results with full visibility
Gain a real-time, cross-platform view that keeps data aligned and teams empowered — helping you make confident decisions and turn insight into measurable business impact.
Get Started
Integrations for every use case
Sales tracking
Customer support management
Code alignment
Team collaboration
Campaign optimization
Sales tracking
Close deals faster
Integrate Salesforce, Quickbooks, or HubSpot to manage leads, track opportunities, and keep your sales process proactive and results-driven.
Customer support management
Stay on top of every request
Connect Zendesk or Active Directory to manage your support tickets in monday.com, helping teams resolve issues faster and keep customers happy.
Code alignment
Keep development and delivery on track
Link pull requests from GitHub or GitLab directly to their related items in monday.com so teams can quickly access code and updates in context.
Team collaboration
Keep teams connected
Integrate your org’s communication tools - Slack, Gmail, Google Calendar, Outlook, Microsoft Teams, and more - to centralize communication and keep work flowing smoothly across channels.
Campaign optimization
Optimize campaign performance
Integrate Mailchimp, Intercom, or Google Ads to track campaign performance, refine strategies, and turn insights into growth.
“monday has all the functionalities and integrations we need without being unnecessarily complicated.”
Naomi M.
Head of Client Success
“monday.com's integrations with other software tools allow for seamless collaboration and project management across teams.”
Ray A.
Director of Customer Experience
“The integration available with Outlook has also helped ensure that important tasks received via emails are not missed and are completed within time.”
Jim M.
Real Estate Agent
Use your go-to AI assistants
Work with tools like Claude, Copilot, and ChatGPT through official integrations or the monday MCP, and keep data secure with trusted AI connectors.
Tailor your workflows with the monday marketplace
Enhance the monday.com experience with apps and integrations built by our trusted partners, helping you customize your workflow to your needs and add new functionality as you grow.
Explore the marketplace
Connect via no-code platforms
Easily connect monday.com to thousands of other tools with - no development needed.
Create a custom solution
Build your own integrations
Use our flexible APIs, SDKs to build custom apps and integrations tailored to your  unique needs.
Explore developer docs
Join as a marketplace partner
Turn your idea into monday app, reach 225,000+ customers, and grow your business on our marketplace.
Become a marketplace partner

hits.title: MondayDB: A new in-house data engine from monday.com
Ask HN: Does anyone use monday.com? Is it better than the others?
Why Monday.com decided to build its new database instead of buying one
Monday.com Shares Jump at IPO, Minting Cloud Software Billionaire in Israel
Show HN: tillywork - opensource work management (monday.com alternative)
Ask HN: Did Monday.com's SendGrid service get compromised?

analysis.name: Monday.com
analysis.tagline: The AI Work Platform for People & Agents
analysis.value_proposition: A single AI-powered work platform where human teams and autonomous agents collaborate across projects, CRM, dev, service, and marketing in one secure place.
analysis.ideal_customer: Mid-market to enterprise teams needing a flexible, no-code work OS spanning project management, CRM, IT service, product development, and marketing with AI automation

features.name: boards
features.description: Core workspace unit for organizing work, tasks, and data in configurable rows and columns
features.evidence_quote: Boards are the place for organizing all your work and data (e.g. projects, clients, processes).

features.name: workdocs
features.description: Collaborative documents with live-updated data connected to board items via real-time engine
features.evidence_quote: Create docs and collaborate with your team in real time... turn those words into actions with live updated data

features.name: templates
features.description: 200+ pre-built templates across industries and use cases, fully customizable
features.evidence_quote: Choose from over 200+ templates for every industry, and customize them to fit your team's needs.

features.name: column types
features.description: Configurable data column types (8 on free, more on paid) to build custom board schemas
features.evidence_quote: Build your board the way you want with a variety of column types.

features.name: ios and android apps
features.description: Native mobile apps for on-the-go board access and updates
features.evidence_quote: Stay connected on-the-go and access monday.com from your smart phone.

features.name: ai credits
features.description: Credit-based consumption system governing AI feature usage across agents, notetaker, sidekick, and vibe apps
features.evidence_quote: Use your AI credits for: AI agent workforce, AI meeting notetaker, Sidekick AI assistant

features.name: ai agent workforce
features.description: Autonomous AI agents that take on specialized tasks and execute work at scale across business functions
features.evidence_quote: Agents take on specialized tasks and support multiple functions for automated execution at scale

features.name: ai meeting notetaker
features.description: AI that joins meetings, captures notes, and converts conversations into actionable board items
features.evidence_quote: Notetaker keeps your team focused during meetings and turns conversations into actionable insights

features.name: sidekick ai assistant
features.description: Context-aware personal AI assistant that understands, connects, and executes work across the platform
features.evidence_quote: Sidekick is an intelligent context-aware AI assistant that understands, connects, and runs your work

features.name: vibe coding / app builder
features.description: No-code tool to build custom business apps on the monday platform in minutes
features.evidence_quote: Turn any business need into a custom business app in minutes

features.name: ai columns
features.description: AI-powered board columns that automatically process, classify, or transform row data
features.evidence_quote: AI columns run your repetitive work directly within your boards, so you can focus on your main priorities

features.name: ai workflow builder
features.description: Orchestrate multi-step workflows connecting AI agents and humans across every team
features.evidence_quote: Orchestrate workflows that connect agents and AI and watch work get done across every team

features.name: automations
features.description: Rule-based automation engine; 250 actions/mo on Standard, 25k on Pro, 250k on Enterprise
features.evidence_quote: Save precious time by automating repetitive tasks in your boards.

features.name: integrations
features.description: 850+ third-party app integrations with action limits by tier (250/25k/250k per month)
features.evidence_quote: Discover 850+ integrations and apps to centralize work, enhance collaboration

features.name: two-way sync integrations
features.description: Bidirectional data sync between monday products and external platforms to trigger automations
features.evidence_quote: Enable 2-way sync between monday products and any platform you work with

features.name: gantt chart
features.description: Visual project timeline view with dependency tracking and milestone management
features.evidence_quote: Gantt & dependencies

features.name: calendar view
features.description: Calendar-based board visualization for deadline and scheduling management
features.evidence_quote: Visualize your work on a Gantt and calendar view to keep everything on schedule.

features.name: kanban view
features.description: Kanban-style column view for visual workflow and status management
features.evidence_quote: Kanban

features.name: advanced board views
features.description: Charts, graphs, and diagram visualizations for analytics and data-driven reporting
features.evidence_quote: Visualize your data with different types of charts, graphs and diagrams.

features.name: dashboards
features.description: Cross-board reporting dashboards composed of widgets for real-time portfolio visibility
features.evidence_quote: Dashboards

features.name: widgets
features.description: Modular dashboard building blocks for customizing reporting views
features.evidence_quote: Widgets

features.name: guest access
features.description: External users scoped to only the boards they are explicitly invited to
features.evidence_quote: Guests are external users who can only access boards you invite them to, keeping the rest of your account private.

features.name: unlimited viewers
features.description: Read-only seats at no additional cost for stakeholders who do not need to edit
features.evidence_quote: Viewers have read-only access to your account data, with no editing rights.

features.name: unlimited items
features.description: No row/item cap across boards on paid plans
features.evidence_quote: Items are the rows in monday.com boards... Items can be anything you want

features.name: private boards and docs
features.description: Boards and docs visible only to owner and explicitly invited members
features.evidence_quote: Private boards and docs are only visible to you and team members you invite.

features.name: time tracking
features.description: Built-in time tracking column to log and monitor time spent per task
features.evidence_quote: Track and monitor the time spent on each task.

features.name: advanced columns
features.description: Dynamic dependency columns and complex automated cross-board formula calculations
features.evidence_quote: Leverage advanced columns to create dynamic dependencies between tasks and perform complex automated calculations

features.name: formula column
features.description: Computed columns with custom formula logic referencing other board data
features.evidence_quote: Formula Column

features.name: connect boards column
features.description: Cross-board item linking enabling relational data across workspaces
features.evidence_quote: Connect Boards Column

features.name: dependency management
features.description: Task and milestone dependencies with automated timeline adjustments on Gantt
features.evidence_quote: Dependencies

features.name: portfolio management
features.description: Connect multiple projects to a unified portfolio with real-time cross-project visibility
features.evidence_quote: Connect projects to a unified portfolio with rea[l-time visibility]

features.name: enterprise security and governance
features.description: Top-tier security features, SSO, audit logs, and user management controls
features.evidence_quote: Get top-tier security features & user management controls.

features.name: sso
features.description: Single sign-on via SAML/enterprise identity providers for centralized authentication
features.evidence_quote: User authentication

features.name: roles and permissions
features.description: Role-based access control for workspace members and administrators
features.evidence_quote: Roles & permissions

features.name: board permissions
features.description: Granular per-board visibility and editing access controls
features.evidence_quote: Board permissions

features.name: import and export (excel)
features.description: Import from and export to Excel spreadsheets for data migration and reporting
features.evidence_quote: Import & export from Excel

features.name: apps marketplace
features.description: Curated marketplace of 850+ partner-built apps to extend platform functionality
features.evidence_quote: Enhance the monday.com experience with apps and integrations built by our trusted partners

features.name: no-code integration builder
features.description: Connect monday to thousands of additional tools via no-code platforms without development
features.evidence_quote: Easily connect monday.com to thousands of other tools with - no development needed.

features.name: workcanvas
features.description: Digital whiteboard product for visual collaboration, brainstorming, and creative work
features.evidence_quote: Create and innovate on a digital whiteboard

features.name: workforms
features.description: Standalone form builder to collect requests, feedback, and data feeding into boards
features.evidence_quote: Gather requests, feedback and data all in one place

features.name: monday crm
features.description: Dedicated CRM product for lead management, pipeline tracking, and customer communication
features.evidence_quote: Track and manage all aspects of your sales cycle

features.name: monday dev
features.description: Agile R&D product with sprint management, roadmaps, releases, and dev tool integrations
features.evidence_quote: Build agile workflows to empower your R&D teams

features.name: monday service
features.description: IT service management product with ticketing, customer portal, and multi-channel support
features.evidence_quote: Manage your service operations from A to Z

features.name: monday campaigns
features.description: Email marketing product for campaign creation, management, and performance tracking
features.evidence_quote: monday campaigns — For email marketing teams

features.name: sprint management
features.description: Agile sprint planning, backlog, and velocity tracking for development teams
features.evidence_quote: Sprint management

features.name: customer portal
features.description: External-facing portal allowing customers to submit and track their own support tickets
features.evidence_quote: Customer portal

features.name: ticket management
features.description: Service desk ticketing with automated intake, triage, and resolution workflows
features.evidence_quote: Intake & Triage Expert — Solves tickets automatically

features.name: lead management
features.description: CRM lead capture, qualification, and pipeline progression tracking
features.evidence_quote: Lead management

features.name: monday mcp
features.description: Model Context Protocol server enabling AI assistants to securely read and act on monday data
features.evidence_quote: monday MCP — Amplify your impact with AI

features.name: agent builder (agent factory)
features.description: No-code builder for creating custom AI agents scoped to specific business functions
features.evidence_quote: Agent Factory — AI agent builder

features.name: pre-built agent templates
features.description: Ready-to-deploy agent templates (meeting scheduler, project monitor, competitor researcher, content creator, etc.)
features.evidence_quote: Meeting Scheduler, Project Monitor, Vendor Researcher, Competitor Researcher, Content Creator, Performance Analyst

features.name: mondaydb
features.description: Proprietary in-house data engine built for performance and scale, replacing third-party databases
features.evidence_quote: MondayDB: A new in-house data engine from monday.com

features.name: 24/7 support
features.description: Round-the-clock chat support for all customers
features.evidence_quote: 24/7 support

features.name: academy and certification
features.description: Interactive courses, webinars, and certifications for platform expertise
features.evidence_quote: Interactive courses and webinars that will make you an expert

features.name: community forum
features.description: Peer learning community for knowledge sharing among monday.com users
features.evidence_quote: Learn with fellow monday.com enthusiasts

differentiators: Trusted by over 60% of the Fortune 500
AI agent workforce enabling people and agents to work side by side on one platform
MondayDB: proprietary in-house data engine built for enterprise scale
monday MCP: Model Context Protocol for AI assistant interoperability with workspace data
monday vibe: no-code custom app builder running natively on the platform
One platform spanning PM, CRM, dev, IT service, email marketing, and HR
AI workflow builder for orchestrating multi-agent and human hybrid workflows
Agent Factory: build custom autonomous AI agents without code

recent_ships.source: landing: 'monday MCP — Amplify your impact with AI'

praised: "monday has all the functionalities and integrations we need without being unnecessarily complicated." — Naomi M., Head of Client Success
"monday.com's integrations with other software tools allow for seamless collaboration and project management across teams." — Ray A., Director of Customer Experience
"The integration available with Outlook has also helped ensure that important tasks received via emails are not missed and are completed within time." — Jim M., Real Estate Agent
Breadth of integrations (850+) cited as a key reason for adoption
All-in-one platform covering multiple business functions reduces tool sprawl
complaints: HN community questioning competitive differentiation: 'Ask HN: Does anyone use monday.com? Is it better than the others?'
Security concern flagged on HN: 'Ask HN: Did Monday.com's SendGrid service get compromised?'
AI credit system layered on top of per-seat pricing adds pricing complexity and unpredictability
Open-source alternatives emerging (e.g. tillywork mentioned on HN as monday.com alternative)

free_tier.limits: 2 seats, 3 boards, 3 docs, 8 column types, no automations or integrations

tiers.name: Free
tiers.headline_inclusions: Up to 2 seats, 3 boards, 3 docs, 200+ templates, 8 column types, iOS/Android

tiers.name: Basic
tiers.headline_inclusions: Unlimited items & viewers, 1,000 AI credits/mo, 1 vibe app; no automations or integrations

tiers.name: Standard
tiers.headline_inclusions: 2,000 AI credits/mo, 250 automations+integrations actions/mo, Gantt, calendar, guest access

tiers.name: Pro
tiers.headline_inclusions: 3,000 AI credits/mo, 25k automations/mo, private boards, time tracking, AI workflow builder

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: 20,000 AI credits/mo, 250k automations/mo, enterprise security & SSO, portfolio management

pricing.notes: AI credits carry explicit dollar value ($10 per 1,000 credits) bundled into each paid tier; vibe app publish slots are tier-gated (1/2/3/5); pricing page shows promotional discounts ($10–$200/mo off) active at time of scrape; all per-seat prices are billed annually — monthly billing available at higher rates; yearly plan saves 18%; seat minimum not stated but UI calculator defaults to 10 seats

recent_hn.title: Show HN: mcp-recorder – VCR.py for MCP servers. Record, replay, verify
We Shortened Development Feedback Loops from 30M to 30s
